title: rubus ambiguus
intro: Rubus ambiguus, also known as the variable raspberry or variable dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to eastern North America. The Rubus ambiguus plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Rubus ambiguus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal effects.
